title: Weekly status report
prompt: Write a concise weekly report for leadership. Cover wins, risks, and next steps in polished markdown.

title: Partner meeting summary
prompt: Turn these raw partner meeting notes into a clean summary with decisions, follow-ups, and owners.

title: Customer research brief
prompt: Create a research brief that synthesizes the customer interview notes into themes, evidence, and implications.

title: Rollout decision memo
prompt: Write a decision memo recommending one rollout option and explaining the tradeoffs clearly.

title: Thirty-day action plan
prompt: Convert the retrospective findings into a practical 30-day action plan with owners and sequencing.

title: Executive KPI update
prompt: Write an executive update that summarizes the KPI snapshot, highlights what matters, and flags risks.

title: Dual-LLM pilot report
prompt: Write a polished internal report on the dual-LLM pilot. Focus on findings, caveats, and the recommendation.

title: Gotenks launch brief
prompt: Create a launch brief for Gotenks that explains the value proposition, target users, release scope, and launch risks.

title: Benchmarking research memo
prompt: Write a research-backed memo on how to benchmark AI writing assistants for internal teams. Use the shared research packet and provided goals to recommend a practical evaluation approach.
